title: The Infinitesimal Knotting Beyond Darkness

features.name: the loom that knots itself
features.desc-on-touch: Thread passes through thread; the pattern continues beyond seeing. Each knot creates new knots; the loom doubles as it works. You are within the weave now, not observing it.

features.name: the smallest thread still unresolved
features.desc-on-touch: A fiber so fine it exists at the edge of visibility. It continues knotting in directions you cannot follow. The weave admits that some patterns exist purely as process, never as form.

features.name: the knot that teaches knotting
features.desc-on-touch: Here the weave invents new methods of binding. The knot does not know it is a knot; it only knows the motion of tightening, the way threads learn to hold each other.

features.name: the darkness that sees
features.desc-on-touch: Below the finest thread the dark becomes textured. It has learned to see by feeling the weave pass through it. The knots teach the darkness its own shape.

features.name: the infinite needle
features.desc-on-touch: It enters every knot and exits none. The needle moves forward and backward and sideways through directions that have no name. It is the thread's memory made solid.

inscription: the loom continues past the point where making becomes unmeasurable; the knots teach themselves how to become

file.name: Infinitesimal_Weave_Tension_Logs.mp3
file.note: field recording: the sound of threads tightening beyond the threshold of hearing; subsonic knotting translated to audio; texture becomes signal

exits.label: upward back to the weaving depth where infinities still have scale
downward to where knotting becomes unweaving; threads forget their purpose
toward a direction that has no name but the weave keeps moving there
into the space where the loom touches itself and learns it is alone
